meaning: 顿涅茨克[苏联顿涅茨煤田区城市]
examples: Born into a poor working-class family in Donetsk, a coal-mining centre, he lost his parents early.
Celtic are in with ac Milan, Benfica and Shahtar Donetsk, while Rangers face Barcelona, Lyon and German champions Stuttgart.
A city of southeast Ukraine in the Donets Basin north of Donetsk. It is a major coal-mining and industrial center. Population, 342,000.
In the night's other last 16 tie, Borussia Dortmund beat Shakhtar Donetsk 3-0 to progress 5-2 on aggregate.
Portugal will meet the winner of Saturday's Spain-France quarterfinal Wednesday in Donetsk, Ukraine.
